sections: Diving at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships – Men's 10 metre platform
first_paragraph: The **men's 10 metre platform** competition of the [diving events](/wiki/Diving_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "Diving at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships") at the [2011 World Aquatics Championships](/wiki/2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "2011 World Aquatics Championships") was held on July 23 with the preliminary round and the semifinals and the final on 24 July.

The **men's 10 metre platform** competition of the [diving events](/wiki/Diving_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "Diving at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships") at the [2011 World Aquatics Championships](/wiki/2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "2011 World Aquatics Championships") was held on July 23 with the preliminary round and the semifinals and the final on 24 July.
